meaning: n.集合,阅,样品,清单,一群v.集合,召集,征召,鼓起(勇气等),集聚
examples: Shall I muster the crew on the deck?
He beat Thomas Muster of Austria three sets to love.
She left the room with all the dignity she could muster.
The President said today that Congress must muster the political courage to pass immigration reform.
We are rallying all of the expertise we can muster to help them succeed.
